# desec_token_policies (Data Source)

Retrieves all scoping policies for a given deSEC API token.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List all scoping policies for a token
data "desec_token_policies" "all" {
  token_id = "3a6b94b5-d20e-40bd-a7cc-521f5c79fab3"
}

# Output all domains that have an explicit write-allowed policy
output "writable_domains" {
  value = [
    for p in data.desec_token_policies.all.policies : p.domain
    if p.perm_write && p.domain != null
  ]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `token_id` (String) The UUID of the token whose policies to list.

### Read-Only

- `policies` (Attributes List) List of all scoping policies for the token. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policies))

<a id="nestedatt--policies"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policies`

Read-Only:

- `domain` (String) Domain name this policy applies to, or `null` for the default policy.
- `id` (String) The policy's UUID.
- `perm_write` (Boolean) Whether this policy grants write permission.
- `subname` (String) Subname this policy applies to, or `null` for a wildcard match.
- `type` (String) DNS record type this policy applies to, or `null` for a wildcard match.
